$$ is an $$ protocol to control remote s: $Telepath$ is an $auto-mcs$ proto 2 control remote seshs SO SEAMLESSLY. Like, $Telepath$ can yeet ur local comp 2 an instance of $auto-mcs$ runnin' on another comp or a clowd VPS. 2 connect via $Telepath$, enable "share this instance" on the server u tryna connect 2. Then smash "Pair a Server" on the client + follow prompts. Once paired, remote servers pop up in server manager + u can boop em like normal. Also can import/cr8 a server on a $Telepath$ instance.

$Telep@th$ is a $au-to-mcs$ magic wand for smooth brainwave sessions! Like, it zaps your local compu-tator to a $aut0-mcs$ floating in the cloud-universe! Want to sync your vibe with $Telep@th$? Just sprinkle some ‘share this instance’ fairy dust on your server! Then, hit up ‘Pair a Server’ on your cli-enty! Go through the space-wizard prompts. Once link-ed, your remote servers pop up in the Server-Manager like they’re part of the crew! You can also conjure or import servers in your $Telep@th$ realm!

this editor allows you to modify additio: Beep boop! This tinkerer lets you tweak the server magic buttons! Wham bam for speedy zap: • Smash 'CMD+Z' to rewind time, 'CMD+R'/'CMD+Y' for do-over glory! • Bang 'CMD+S' to lock in your genius tweaks! • Smash 'CMD+Q' to ghost the editor! • Hit the magic 'CMD+F' to sniff out numbers! • Thump 'SPACE' to flip the truthy switcheroo (like, yay or nay)!

Glitchy clickity clack! This whirly edito-riffic thingy lets ya twist and twiddle *extra* server confuzzle options! Zoom zap shortcuts for zippy fun: 
• Hit 'CTRL+Z' to whoosh back, and 'CTRL+R'/'CTRL+Y' to fling forward!
• Smash 'CTRL+S' to lock those sparkles away!
• Smash 'CTRL+Q' to poof away like magic!
• Hit 'CTRL+F' to zap zap searchy search data!
• Bash 'SPACE' to jiggle boolean bouncers (yup, truey-falsey kinda deal)!
this is just like my yamaha motorcycle!: Zzzzap! It's like my Yam-a-ha cosmic chariot zoomin' through glowy frizzle-splat!
this menu shows enabled rules from files: This munchy menu flings enabled doodads from wacky files like 'ops.json’ and deactivated goofballs as other joiners dance. Global sparkles spread to every cozy cloud. Ruley-wules can wiggle in funky ways: • Righty-clicky a rule for peek-a-boo and extra goofiness • Lefty-clicky to twist permission ~fuzzle~ • Middle-squish to global wiggle. Rules can be zippity-zapped with the searchy bar, and can pop in with 'Add Rules’ button or hit 'TAB’ for zany vibes. The peek-a-boo list flips between operator doo-dads, baney-bans, and shiny whitelist from the bouncy drop-down at the very tippy top.

This wibbly wobbly menu flibbity flobbs rules from files like 'ops.json' and those pesky disabled beams of light who crash the party. Global rules kaboom every server! Rules can do the funky chicken in many nifty ways: • Rightity clicky a rule to peek, and unlock more sparkly options • Lefty clicky to flip permission like a pancake • Squish the middle mouse to make it global soup. Filters go brrrr with the search bar, and sprinkle rules with the 'Add Rules' button or smash 'TAB'. The jiggy list can flip between operators, bans, and the shiny whitelist from the dropdown shenanigans at the top.
